headline: Lam Research S&P 100 Entry Highlights Role In AI Chip Supply Chain
summary: Lam Research (NasdaqGS:LRCX) is set to join the S&P 100 index, reflecting its rising profile among the largest U.S. companies. The index change recognizes Lam's role in supplying equipment used to manufacture semiconductors that support AI and advanced computing. The inclusion is expected to align Lam Research more closely with other large cap technology and semiconductor names followed by institutional investors. Lam Research focuses on wafer fabrication equipment and services that...
